title: spec-gates policy
description: Declarative gate policy for Spec Kit projects. Consumed by .specify/gates/lib/policy.sh at runtime and validated by /speckit.gates.init and /speckit.gates.upgrade.

_comment.description: Free-form note field. Ignored by the loader. Authored copies may reference this schema URL here.

$schema.description: Optional schema reference for editor tooling.

hooks.description: Map of hook name to hook stanza. Hook names are free-form strings matching the name used by gates_policy_get / gates_policy_list callers.

protected_files.description: Files refused at the agent PreToolUse boundary and by the git forbidden-file scan, on top of the built-in secret/key defaults.

extra.description: Additional paths or globs to protect.

git.description: Toggles for the git-boundary hooks (pre-commit / commit-msg).

block_main_commits.description: Refuse direct commits to main/master (override per-commit with GATES_ALLOW_MAIN_COMMIT=1).

conventional_commits.description: Require Conventional Commits subject format in commit-msg.

forbid_ai_isms.description: Reject AI-ism / self-referential phrasing in commit messages and PRs.

attestation.description: Gate-run evidence settings: attestation records appended per verify.sh run and the pins-based parity gate. Optional; absence means all defaults apply (enabled, 200 records, parity error).

enabled.description: Append an attestation record to .specify/gates/attestations.jsonl on every verify.sh run (and embed it in --json). false also disables the parity gate; canaries are unaffected.

max_records.description: Cap on attestation log lines; the oldest records are dropped once the cap is exceeded.

parity.description: Severity of the synthetic parity gate when a resolved tool version drifts from its lockfile pin: error fails the run, warning reports without failing, off omits the gate.

include.description: Glob patterns selecting files in scope. Consumed by config generators.

exclude.description: Glob patterns excluded from scope. Consumed by config generators.

orchestrator.description: Dispatch style. none = invoke the native tool directly. task = delegate to a Taskfile target. custom = invoke the command in custom_command.

severity.description: How the hook's overall exit code maps to caller-visible severity.

on_missing_runner.description: Behavior when no per-service runner can be resolved for a tool (neither $dir/.venv/bin/<tool> nor `uv run --project $dir <tool>` is available). Default is warn. INFRA-025: applies to the verify-quality legacy walker's Python branch; per-service opt-out via [tool.gates.hooks] skip in pyproject.toml is logged as SKIP regardless of this field.

on_missing_tests.description: Behavior when the test runner reports no tests collected (pytest exit code 5). Default is skip (log SKIP, no WARNING/FAIL). INFRA-026: warn flips to logging WARN and incrementing the warnings counter; consumed by the verify-quality Python branch's pytest classifier.

custom_command.description: Shell command invoked when orchestrator == custom.
